changesProposed.name: Anysphere

current.name: Anysphere
current.founder: Michael Truell, Sualeh Asif, Aman Sanger, Arvid Lunnemark

verified.name: Anysphere
verified.description: American software company offering Cursor, an AI-assisted code editor. Founded in 2022, the company achieved a $29.3 billion valuation and surpassed $1 billion in annual recurring revenue by late 2025.
verified.notes: Most recent valuation ($29.3B) from Series D funding round closed November 13, 2025, co-led by Accel and Coatue Management. Total raised calculated from: $8M seed (Oct 2023) + $60M Series A (Nov 2024) + $900M Series C (June 2025) + $2.3B Series D (Nov 2025) = $3.268B, rounded to $3.3B+. Co-founder Arvid Lunnemark left in October 2025 to found Integrous Research. As of April 2026, xAI announced acquisition option for $60B.

changesProposed.name: Rivian

verified.name: Rivian
verified.description: American electric vehicle manufacturer founded in 2009 that produces electric SUVs (R1S), pickup trucks (R1T), and delivery vans on a skateboard platform. The company became public in November 2021.

Wikipedia source indicates Volkswagen Group ownership at 16%, while Electrek news source [4] indicates 15.9% stake as of May 2026, suggesting recent changes in ownership structure.
